The '''All-Species Replica Droid''', or simply '''ARD''', was a sophisticated model of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that was designed to be nearly indistinguishable from any [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] being that it was created to look like, both in form and function. These droids were, as far as was known, only a work in progress, the concept being researched by the [[Onadax Droid Technologies]] Corporation.

{{Droid-stub}}
